commands: backend: python manage.py makemigrations execution trading --check --dry-run
expected_results: A WIN TradeOutcomeRecord routes to exactly one PENDING NotificationCandidate; the outcome record is marked routed=True.
A LOSS TradeOutcomeRecord routes to NO candidate (marked routed=True).
A BREAKEVEN TradeOutcomeRecord routes to NO candidate (marked routed=True).
A WIN whose is_delivery_candidate is False creates NO candidate (defensive edge).
correlation_id / signal_source / net_pnl are preserved from the outcome record onto the candidate.
Idempotent: re-runs create no duplicate candidate and do not re-route (a second run reports routed=0); a routed record is never reprocessed.

The outcome router references/imports no Telegram/WIMS/order path (no order_send/ConsumptionContract/deliver_trade_result/ExecutionJob; no wims/telegram/requests/urllib/intelligence import); NotificationCandidate.status is always PENDING here.
Migrations additive (TradeOutcomeRecord.routed; NotificationCandidate); full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance pass.
actual_results: RoutingTests: WIN → PENDING candidate + routed, counts {routed:1,candidates:1,internal_only:0} PASS; LOSS → 0 candidates + routed PASS; BREAKEVEN → 0 candidates + routed PASS; WIN-without-flag → 0 candidates (internal_only) PASS; correlation preserved PASS; mixed batch counts {routed:4,candidates:2,internal_only:2} PASS.
IdempotencyTests: three runs → 1 candidate, second run routed=0 PASS; already-routed WIN → 0 candidates, routed=0 PASS.

BoundaryAndCommandTests: AST — none of order_send/order_check/agent_order/deliver_trade_result/ingest_winning_trade/ConsumptionContract/send_message/sendMessage/ExecutionJob present; imports exclude wims/telegram/intelligence/requests/urllib PASS; run_outcome_router creates a candidate for a WIN PASS.
Full backend suite: Ran 419 tests OK.
makemigrations execution trading --check: No changes detected; make secret-scan OK; governance-check OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.
Adversarial 3-lens boundary review: recorded in the PR; see synthesis.
limitations: Repo-only — no Telegram transport, no WIMS publishing, no deploy, no execution change, no order_send, no E3.
The router only creates internal NotificationCandidate rows (status PENDING) and is not wired to any scheduler or live path (run manually via run_outcome_router).
NotificationCandidate has no transport/channel binding by design; a future, separately-gated notification packet chooses the transport and moves PENDING → SENT/SUPPRESSED.
No real WIN exists yet (no real trade is placed in shadow mode); the router is validated against constructed outcome records.
